title: Pink Paper Sweet Bags 5 x 7” | REALUS 100pk Small Empty Sweets Bag | MADE IN BRITAIN | Retro Candy Stripe Sweetie Bags – Perfect for Kids Party, Pic n Mix Shop, Wedding Favours, Popcorn
features: ECOLOGICAL FOOTPRINT - 100% Recyclable and Biodegradable, at Realus we care greatly about the environment and have ensured all the sweetie bags we sell are fully recyclable and biodegradable
QUALITY MATERIAL - Made from high quality, durable pink & white kraft paper, though small it can carry a lot of weight and is more than suitable for catering, sweets, weddings, birthdays, etc.
MADE IN THE UK - We proudly source all of our bags directly from UK manufacturers. Supporting local businesses is something we are very passionate about here at Realus.
POTENTIAL USES - Perfect sweet goodie bags for birthdays, weddings and other celebrations. Ideal for convenience and food stores, it's simple yet effective design can suit any theme.
GREAT NOSTALGIA – A great sense of nostalgia from back in the day. used in specific shops e.g., Grocery Stores, Sweet Shops, Gift Shops, Retail Stores, Off Licenses, Market Place Stalls.
description: Product Description Excellent Quality, Affordable Candy Sweet Bags Our sweetie bags are made with high-quality, 40 GSM, oil-resistant kraft paper. They have a wide range of uses such as pick and mix bags or even party bags! Realus Candy Stripe Bags Great Quality Although candy bags are simple products, we have put a lot of time into ensuring ours is the best around. You will be getting a high-quality and reliable product every time. We work vigilantly with our suppliers to ensure we are always using the highest quality materials that uphold our high standards here at Realus. Made in Britain We are extremely proud to say our bags are all sourced and manufactured within the United Kingdom. Making sure our bags are all ethically sourced from UK manufacturers is a big thing for us. Nostalgic Style Our party bags often bring a big sense of nostalgia when being used. They look and feel like old traditional candy bags and they are a perfect addition to many events like weddings, christenings, or even children's parties. They also come in a wide range of cool colors so our bags can be used in a wide range of applications Overview Great Quality Nostalgic Wide Range of Uses Wide Range of Vibrant Colours Made in Britain Simple yet Great Our goody bags are a great addition to any children's parties to put sweeties and other goodies inside. You are able to get our bags in 9 different colors so you can bet there is a color for everyone! Size 5 x 7 Inches Colour Pink Material Oil-Resistant Kraft GSM 40 Pack Size 100 Design White with Pink Stripes Wide range of uses Our candy-sweet bags have a huge range of uses! Weddings, Christenings, Pick and Mix Shops, Sweetie Counters, Party Bags, Funeral, Kids Parties just to name a few
